title: Grok Voice Think Fast 1.0
citation: xAI. Grok Voice Think Fast 1.0. Apr 23, 2026. Accessed 2026-05-03.
permitted_uses: Vendor capability assessment for commercial voice-agent adapter planning.
claims_supported: xAI announced grok-voice-think-fast-1.0 as a flagship voice model available via API.
xAI describes the model as optimized for low response latency, tool orchestration, interruptions, noisy audio, accents, and multilingual use.
claims_not_supported: That Grok voice is medically validated for clinical education.
That Grok voice should be the only provider or that it satisfies institutional privacy requirements without review.
